name: Gigabyte B650M D2H DDR5 AMD AM5 Motherboard
highlights: The Gigabyte B650M D2H is a robust Micro ATX motherboard designed for AMD Ryzen™ 7000, 8000, and 9000 Series processors, featuring AMD B650 chipset support
It offers dual-channel DDR5 memory support up to 128GB, integrated AMD Radeon™ graphics with HDMI 2
5GbE LAN, and multiple expansion slots, including PCIe 4
description: Gigabyte B650M D2H DDR5 AMD AM5 Motherboard Price in Pakistan Component Specifications CPU Support AMD Socket AM5, supports: – AMD Ryzen™ 7000 Series – AMD Ryzen™ 8000 Series – AMD Ryzen™ 9000 Series (Check GIGABYTE’s website for the latest CPU support list) Chipset AMD B650 Memory Support – DDR5 6400(OC)/6200(OC)/6000(OC)/5600(OC)/5200/4800/4400 MT/s – 2 x DDR5 DIMM sockets, up to 128GB (64GB per DIMM) – Dual channel memory architecture – Non-ECC
